context: 25-question RFP to demonstrate scale, parallelism, and confidence calibration on a realistic mid-size questionnaire.

questions.text: Provide an overview of your endpoint detection architecture and the telemetry types collected.
What is your median and p95 detection-to-alert latency? How is it measured?
List all operating systems and versions your agent supports, including ARM64.
What is the agent's CPU, memory, and disk footprint at steady state and peak?
Describe your agent update mechanism and rollback safeguards.
Which identity providers do you integrate with for SSO and for identity-threat detection?
List all current compliance certifications, auditors, and most recent audit dates.
What is your FedRAMP authorization status?
Describe your penetration testing cadence and provider.
Do you carry cyber liability / tech E&O insurance? State coverage limits.
Provide per-endpoint annual pricing for 500, 2,500, and 10,000 endpoints (EDR only and EDR+MDR).
What is the minimum contract term and what multi-year discounts are available?
Are professional services / onboarding included? At what threshold?
Describe your data residency options and how EU customer data is isolated.
What encryption is applied at rest and in transit? Which key-management options are offered?
What is your data retention policy for raw telemetry, alerts, and audit logs?
Describe your console RBAC model and SCIM support.
What remote response actions can be executed from the console or API?
What is your console availability SLA and the associated service credit schedule?
List your current sub-processors and your notification policy for changes.
How many customers do you serve in the financial services vertical? Name 2 references.
Provide company founding year, headquarters, employee count, and funding stage.
What is your customer logo retention and net revenue retention?
Do you offer a no-cost proof-of-concept? What are the terms?
Describe your roadmap for post-quantum / quantum-resistant cryptography.
